errMsg:
执行出错 错误信息：[解析错误，SQL:SHOW TABLES ]; 具体原因：[Encountered " <S_IDENTIFIER> "SHOW "" at line 1, column 1.
Was expecting one of:
    "SET" ...
    "DROP" ...
    "DELETE" ...
    "INSERT" ...
    "REPLACE" ...
    "TRUNCATE" ...
    "EXEC" ...
    "EXECUTE" ...
    "MERGE" ...
    "COMMENT" ...
    "SELECT" ...
    "WITH" ...
    "(" ...
    "UPDATE" ...
    "CREATE" ...
    "ALTER" ...
    ]; 改写后SQL[SHOW TABLES ]
